idea-plugin.name: devradar
idea-plugin.description:
devradar shows which of your teammates currently have the same git repository open and are coding right now — across IDEs. Works in any IntelliJ-based IDE (Rider, IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, GoLand, WebStorm, and more), and alongside the matching Visual Studio Code extension.

Zero configuration: your identity comes from git (user.name / user.email), and the "room" is derived from the repository's remote URL — so everyone who opened the same repo is automatically in the same room. No login, no token, no setup.

It shows online / offline status and which file each person has open, in a small status-bar widget; click it for the full list. Optional settings (Tools → devradar): a custom server URL, a display name, and a team key for private rooms.

The presence server is open source (Cloudflare Workers + Durable Objects): github.com/mertkont/devradar

action.description: Open the devradar chat tool window
